name: alphaluppi-plugins
description: Plugins maison Alpha Luppi pour Claude Code — skills, agents et outils internes empaquetés pour distribution.

plugins.name: expo-ios-testflight
plugins.description: Ship an Expo / React Native iOS app to TestFlight from a local Mac (or CI): build with `eas build --local`, submit, and promote to the public external-testing group — encoding the fastlane/certificate/rsync build pitfalls, the App Store Connect JWT API (submit, external review, demo account, release notes, rate-limit), version stamping, and a simulator-verify recipe with the sandbox-input workarounds.

plugins.name: loom-monitoring
plugins.description: Make any application monitorable by Loom — bring an app, worker, cron, website, or external service into compliance with Loom's health/heartbeat contract so it can be registered as a service and probed automatically.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Crée et entretient un wiki Obsidian-compatible piloté par LLM (ingest, query, lint, MOC auto, capture continue).
